title: EEE Bootcamp
description: Official website for the EEE branch at IIIT Bhubaneswar, serving as a digital archive for students, achievements, and memories.

title: College Forum
description: A full-stack community forum for students. Features a TypeScript monorepo with React, Fastify, and PostgreSQL.

title: Web3 Lottery
description: A fully decentralized lottery system using Solidity smart contracts and Chainlink VRF for provable randomness.

title: D3 Fest Website
description: Central hub for fest events, schedules, and registrations with a scalable component system.

title: Advaita Fest Website
description: Full event platform for Advaita IIIT Bhubaneswar, focusing on scalability and reusable UI components.
